key_learnings: Cultural dietary traditions often encode nutritionally balanced meals developed over generations.
research_findings: Traditional diets from diverse cultures share common features with the Mediterranean diet.
current_focus_areas: Expanding the food database with region-specific ingredients and traditional preparation methods.
